metadata.name: Identify a Story Idea from Online Forums

description: A community manager is monitoring a local online forum and notices many people are complaining about a specific local issue, suggesting a potential story.

nodes.task_description: Monitor local online forums (e.g., Reddit, neighborhood Facebook groups) for trending topics.

expected_outcome.value: Agent is aware of what the community is talking about.

nodes.task_description: Identify a recurring complaint or issue that is gaining traction.

expected_outcome.value: Agent spots a potential story lead.

nodes.task_description: Write a brief summary of the issue and the public sentiment around it.
Submit the story idea to the editorial team for consideration.

expected_outcome.value: The potential story lead is passed to the newsroom.
